description:
Search for an existing patient and update their contact information in Care2x Hospital Information System.

First, log in to Care2x using credentials: admin / care2x_admin
Then search for the patient named 'Maria Garcia' (already registered in the system).
Update this patient's phone number to: 713-555-0299
Also update their email to: maria.garcia@newmail.com

To access the Patient module, expand the Menu tree in the left navigation and click 'Patient', then use the 'Search' sub-menu.

URL: http://localhost/
